description_long: This armchair features a bold, geometric design with a boxy silhouette and sharp, angular lines. The entire surface is covered in a vibrant pink and white patterned upholstery, consisting of repeating, abstract floral or geometric motifs. The armrests are wide and rectangular, matching the blocky proportions of the seat and backrest, which are both thick and substantial. The backrest is tall and straight, providing ample support, while the seat is deep and spacious, inviting comfortable seating. There are no visible legs, giving the chair a grounded, monolithic appearance. The upholstery pattern is consistent across all surfaces, creating a visually striking and cohesive look.
description: A boxy, geometric armchair with wide rectangular armrests and a tall, straight back, fully upholstered in a vibrant pink and white abstract pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, tall backrest, and broad armrests, all covered in the pink and white patterned fabric.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, blocky armrest and the depth of the seat, with the pattern continuing seamlessly.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tall, rectangular backrest and the continuous upholstery pattern wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other armrest and the solid, monolithic base, emphasizing the chair's block-like construction.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, rectangular, fully upholstered in patterned fabric
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs, solid block base
attribute_upholstery_pattern: abstract pink and white geometric/floral print
